snippet.title: Kristy Blackwell — Modern Edge Ceramics
snippet.description: Coil-built vessels, glaze tests, and kiln firings from a working ceramics studio in Albuquerque, New Mexico. Studio process, gallery shows, and the occasional Southwest kitchen detour.

channel.title: Kristy Blackwell — Modern Edge Ceramics
channel.description: Coil-built ceramic vessels, glaze chemistry, and kiln firings from a working studio in Albuquerque, New Mexico.
channel.keywords: ceramics coil building glaze chemistry kiln firing stoneware pottery studio contemporary art new mexico
